meaning: n.高棉人(居住在柬埔寨,中世纪曾有高度文明),高棉语
examples: UN officials say two military observers were seized by the Khmer Rouge yesterday.
In a reenactment scene, Khmer men working with stone grinding construction.
Dancers in traditional Khmer dress prepare to perform at the Angkor temple complex.
The soldiers nodded and smiled at each other, and one of the Thais greeted the Cambodians in Khmer.
Its yellow-washed, green-shuttered, colonial-era buildings and angular, post-independence "new Khmer" architecture were both, rightly, renowned.
